Class GameScreenController

java.lang.Object
com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.GameScreenController
All Implemented Interfaces:
GameEventListener, javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class GameScreenController extends Object implements javafx.fxml.Initializable, GameEventListener
Controlador de GameScreen.fxml. Recibe el modelo vía initModel() (llamado desde GameScreenView después de cargar el FXML). Crea internamente un GameController (clase sin dependencias de JavaFX) que se encarga de orquestar GameLogic y TurnManager; este controlador se limita a: (1) traducir clics de la GUI en llamadas a GameController, (2) traducir eventos del modelo (vía GameEventListener) en actualizaciones visuales. Toda la lógica de reglas vive en GameLogic / CardValueCalculator / Deck / Player; toda la lógica de orquestación de turnos vive en GameController.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    initialize(URL location, ResourceBundle resources)
     
    void
    initModel(GameLogic model, int numOpponents)
    Inyecta el modelo.
    void
    onCardDrawn(Player player, Card card)
    Fired after a player has drawn a replacement card from the deck.
    void
    onCardPlayed(Player player, Card card, int newSum)
    Fired after a player has successfully played a card onto the table.
    void
    onDeckRefreshed(int newDeckSize)
    Fired when the deck runs out of cards and is refilled by reshuffling the table pile (excluding the top card).
    void
    onGameOver(Player winner)
    Fired when only one player remains and the game is over.
    void
    onGameStarted(int tableSum)
    Fired once after the game has been fully set up: all players have received their 4 starting cards and the initial table card has been placed.
    void
    onInvalidPlay(Player player, Card card, int currentSum)
    Fired when an attempt to play an invalid card is detected (mainly relevant for the human player's GUI interaction).
    void
    onPlayerEliminated(Player player)
    Fired when a player is eliminated because none of their cards can be played without exceeding a table sum of 50.
    void
    onTurnStarted(Player player)
    Fired at the beginning of a player's turn so the View can highlight the active player and enable / disable controls.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • GameScreenController

      public GameScreenController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL location, ResourceBundle resources)
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable

    • initModel

      public void initModel(GameLogic model, int numOpponents)
      Inyecta el modelo. Llamado por GameScreenView justo después de load(). setupGame() ya fue ejecutado por MainMenuController antes de crear la vista.
      Parameters:
      model - GameLogic ya configurado
      numOpponents - número de rivales (1, 2 o 3)

    • onGameStarted

      public void onGameStarted(int tableSum)
      Description copied from interface: GameEventListener
      Fired once after the game has been fully set up: all players have received their 4 starting cards and the initial table card has been placed.
      Specified by:
      onGameStarted in interface GameEventListener
      Parameters:
      tableSum - the initial sum on the table (0, 1, or -10 depending on the first card drawn)

    • onTurnStarted

      public void onTurnStarted(Player player)
      Description copied from interface: GameEventListener
      Fired at the beginning of a player's turn so the View can highlight the active player and enable / disable controls.
      Specified by:
      onTurnStarted in interface GameEventListener
      Parameters:
      player - the player whose turn is starting

    • onCardPlayed

      public void onCardPlayed(Player player, Card card, int newSum)
      Description copied from interface: GameEventListener
      Fired after a player has successfully played a card onto the table.
      Specified by:
      onCardPlayed in interface GameEventListener
      Parameters:
      player - the player who played the card
      card - the card that was played
      newSum - the updated table sum after the card was played

    • onCardDrawn

      public void onCardDrawn(Player player, Card card)
      Description copied from interface: GameEventListener
      Fired after a player has drawn a replacement card from the deck.
      Specified by:
      onCardDrawn in interface GameEventListener
      Parameters:
      player - the player who drew the card
      card - the card drawn (visible only for the human player; for machines the View should display it face-down)

    • onDeckRefreshed

      public void onDeckRefreshed(int newDeckSize)
      Description copied from interface: GameEventListener
      Fired when the deck runs out of cards and is refilled by reshuffling the table pile (excluding the top card).
      Specified by:
      onDeckRefreshed in interface GameEventListener
      Parameters:
      newDeckSize - the number of cards now available in the refreshed deck

    • onPlayerEliminated

      public void onPlayerEliminated(Player player)
      Description copied from interface: GameEventListener
      Fired when a player is eliminated because none of their cards can be played without exceeding a table sum of 50.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerEliminated in interface GameEventListener
      Parameters:
      player - the eliminated player

    • onGameOver

      public void onGameOver(Player winner)
      Description copied from interface: GameEventListener
      Fired when only one player remains and the game is over.
      Specified by:
      onGameOver in interface GameEventListener
      Parameters:
      winner - the surviving (winning) player

    • onInvalidPlay

      public void onInvalidPlay(Player player, Card card, int currentSum)
      Description copied from interface: GameEventListener
      Fired when an attempt to play an invalid card is detected (mainly relevant for the human player's GUI interaction).
      Specified by:
      onInvalidPlay in interface GameEventListener
      Parameters:
      player - the player who attempted the invalid play
      card - the card that was rejected
      currentSum - the sum on the table at the time of the attempt
